feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: What the Hell, Bruce?
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,142Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: The Batfamily discovers that Batman and Killer Croc have unresolved sexual tension, a mysterious history, and apparently 𝘩𝘰𝘰𝘬𝘦𝘥 𝘶𝘱 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘦𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘩𝘴 𝘢𝘨𝘰. Jason is the first to notice. He desperately wishes he wasn't.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Bruce Wayne/Killer Croc (past)
  • Batfamily & Bruce Wayne
  • Waylon Jones/Bruce Wayne

  • Tim Drake

entry.title: Mr. and Mrs. Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: GothamNocturne

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,210Chapters: 39/?Kudos: 37

Summary: **This is the sequel to Bruce and Selina** Bruce Wayne finally chooses the life he once believed he couldn't have - a wife, a daughter, and a world he's trying to hold together. But peace in Gotham never comes without a cost. When an old debt pulls Selina into something she can't walk away from, secrets begin to fracture the foundation of both their marriage and the Justice League. As whispers of invasion spread and trust begins to erode, Bruce is forced to make an impossible choice: Stand with the world. Or stand with his family. Because sometimes the greatest threat isn't the one descending from the stars - It's the one everyone believes is already inside your home. And this time, the cowl may not survive the cost.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Collapse
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,061Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: Bruce collapses in the Batcave mid-sentence. No enemy. No poison. No warning. Just his own body giving out after weeks of neglect. The family scrambles to catch him— ...and then has to figure out how to keep him down.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Hal vs the Batfam
entry.summary:
Author: Phoenix_feathers17

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,771Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 2,246

Summary: It all started when Hal first met them (If you can call what happened a meeting). It couldn't say exactly how his first encounter went down as he had been too confused to keep up with all that happened around him. It was after his second encounter with one, though, that everything started to go downhill. For some reason, he had caught the sight of the batkids (yes, batkids. The Batman had kids) and now he just had to survive their antics until Bats decided to introduce them to the rest of the league. Oa help him if that doesn't happen soon.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Another Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,255Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 590

Summary: A clash of opposing plans causes Batman to accidentally be doused with a hybrid of not-quite-Fear Toxin and Ivy's pheromones. In order to cope with the opposing influences, his brain convinces him that the four Rogues who were keyed to them - Scarecrow, Ivy, Harley Quinn, and Riddler - have been deaged into children. Obviously he'll have to bring them home and look after them until an antidote is made. Meanwhile, by order of the Batkids in order to NOT break Batman's mind, said Rogues are forced to play along.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the shovel talk, extended universe edition
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,577Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Bruce Wayne's past and present love interests discover that Deathstroke was his first. They form an impromptu coalition. Slade Wilson contemplates the benefits of early retirement. Bruce contemplates the benefits of a timeline where he made better choices. Neither gets what they want.

entry.title: the shovel talk, plural, with extreme prejudice
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,068Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: The Batfamily discovers that Deathstroke has been sleeping with their dad's teenage alternate-timeline self. They take this about as well as can be expected. Bruce (present) and Bruce (nineteen) watch from a rooftop. Neither is entirely sure they want to intervene.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 129,577Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.   i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: She broken on my ribs till I pneumothorax
entry.summary:
Author: Ooooooooooshinything

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,008Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 396

Summary: Jason was tired. I mean. He was always tired but right now more than usual because right now he was chained to a chair.But the justice league.In space.In their super secret headquarters in space. Or Jason Todd gets his shot rocked by the justice league while Batman is off in space and it turns out the cure to daddy issues is life threatening injuries :D   (The title is in the works maybe probably I just didn’t know what else to call it lmao)

entry.title: The Tragedy of Bruce Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,878Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 1,482

Summary: After a devastating betrayal leaves Damian Wayne questioning everything he thought he knew about his family, Dick Grayson finds himself forced into a role he never expected: protector, advocate, and perhaps even father. As old wounds resurface and long-buried truths come to light, the Batfamily must confront not only what was done to Damian, but the patterns that have shaped all of their lives. Faced with impossible choices, they begin asking a question none of them ever dared consider before: What happens when the mission is no longer worth the cost?

entry.title: Lights! Cameras! And ACTION!
entry.summary:
Author: Fishwithabow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,183Chapters: 16/25Kudos: 184

Summary: You are Bruce’s Wayne only BLOOD daughter. He adopted you when you were nine following your mother’s sudden death. Your mother used to be a well known actor and so of course, like mother like daughter, you too wanted to be an actor. Your father and your new siblings for some reason tend to forget about you and end up leaving you in their dust. Will that ever change? Will you become famous before they ever notice you? Or will something happen that will change your whole view of your life? Also this is a crossover, you just don’t know it. CURRENTLY REVISING STORY!! NO NEW CHAPTERS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE!!

entry.title: Four times Bruce Wayne was an unemotional robot and one time Dick Grayson called him out on it
entry.summary:
Author: Miaahhh

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 277Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 13

Summary: Bruce’s white lenses narrow dangerously at him. He swallows.    Bruce is his dad. He isn’t scared of Bruce. That’d be stupid.   He sighs. “Was that a good enough mission report?”   Bruce hums. “It was good enough.” His gravelly voice echoes across the cave, and his footsteps do, too, as he walks to the bat computer.

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 227,983Chapters: 43/?Kudos: 410

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Coastline Alibi
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,627Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 7

Summary: The Batfamily walks into a situation. Or rather, 𝘥𝘰𝘦𝘴𝘯'𝘵 walk into it—because Bruce and Salix are nowhere to be found. When Alfred finally tracks them down, the family receives photographic evidence that their patriarch and his best friend have committed the ultimate crime: enjoying a peaceful nap together.

entry.title: a body of things you did not bury
entry.summary:
Author: AdmirableOcelet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,266Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 12

Summary: "𝘐𝘧 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘥𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘶𝘭𝘦 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘧𝘶𝘵𝘶𝘳𝘦 𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘧 𝘴𝘦𝘵𝘴 𝘰𝘶𝘵, 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘺 𝘥𝘪𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘬𝘪𝘭𝘭?" The Batfamily gets an education in loopholes. Rook gets the last sandwich. Alfred does not approve of hypothetical body disposal in the rose garden. Bruce is off-world. His teenage past self eats all the sandwiches and explains, in exhaustive and deeply unsettling detail, exactly how he never broke a rule he didn't have. The Batfamily has a normal one about it.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Between Right and Wrong
entry.summary:
Author: archa1cAc1ds

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,148Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Ace, the child of the Joker, runs away. He couldn't take his father's relentless abuse anymore. After surviving on his own for a while on the streets of Gotham, he gets some unexpected help.
